name: Morph
description: Native Morph WarpGrep codebase search plus fast context compaction for OpenClaw.

apiKey.label: Morph API Key
apiKey.help: Morph API key used for WarpGrep searches and fast compaction. Falls back to MORPH_API_KEY.

baseUrl.label: Morph API Base URL
baseUrl.help: Override the Morph API base URL.

warpGrepTimeoutMs.label: WarpGrep Timeout (ms)
warpGrepTimeoutMs.help: Maximum time to wait for a WarpGrep search.

includes.label: Include Globs
includes.help: Optional glob allowlist passed to WarpGrep.

excludes.label: Exclude Globs
excludes.help: Optional glob denylist passed to WarpGrep.

compactEnabled.label: Enable Fast Compaction
compactEnabled.help: Compact older context with Morph before the model call.

compactTimeoutMs.label: Compaction Timeout (ms)
compactTimeoutMs.help: Maximum time to wait for Morph compaction.

compactThresholdChars.label: Compaction Threshold (chars)
compactThresholdChars.help: Only compact when the assembled context reaches this approximate size.

compactPreserveRecent.label: Keep Recent Messages
compactPreserveRecent.help: Number of newest messages to leave uncompressed.

compactCompressionRatio.label: Compaction Ratio
compactCompressionRatio.help: Fraction of older context Morph should keep during compaction.

compactModel.label: Compaction Model
compactModel.help: Optional Morph compaction model override passed to the compact endpoint.
